name: 2×YT Medium

notes.en: Dissolve in ddH₂O, adjust pH to 7.0 with NaOH, bring to volume. Autoclave at 121°C for 20 min. Richer than LB (2× yeast extract and tryptone), ideal for phage display and high-density protein expression. Add antibiotics after cooling.
notes.zh: ddH₂O 定容至 1000 mL，调 pH 至 7.0 (NaOH)。121°C 高压灭菌 20 min。比 LB 营养更丰富，适用于噬菌体展示、高密度蛋白表达等。冷却后加抗生素。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed., CSHL Press
